todo.text: [Career] 🔨 Build: create a daily creative challenge generator page or tool that gives Philippe one finishable same-day assignment; deliverable: working page or tool in projects/creative-challenges/ that automatically chooses the daily category across Blender, After Effects, Unreal Engine, Illustrator, commercial copywriting, and storytelling/novel writing, then shows only the assigned challenge with optional light visual support | Why: Structured daily challenge generation turns broad creative goals into consistent, scoped practice without decision friction | Proof: Tool assigns one different day-sized challenge per day without user category selection and shows only the prompt/challenge for that day | Unlocks: Reusable daily practice system for portfolio, writing, and creative skill growth

[Other] 🔧 Fix: identify one OpenClaw process weakness and propose a small reliability improvement with clear input/output, excluding openclaw.json and any live config mutation path; deliverable: markdown spec in projects/automation/ | Why: Improves OpenClaw reliability - essential for autonomous operations | Proof: Spec targets an OpenClaw process weakness without proposing risky live config edits | Unlocks: Progress toward: Write a simple script with input validation

[Trading] 🔧 Fix: identify one safe improvement opportunity in the trading-bot workspace, such as diagnostics, reporting, review tooling, or non-execution reliability; deliverable: markdown spec in the relevant bot project notes folder | Why: Real market analysis and execution builds trading skill faster than passive learning | Proof: Spec targets a real bot-support improvement and avoids unsafe live-trading config changes | Unlocks: Unlocks a higher-quality system improvement task for the trading bots

[Career] 📝 Draft: draft 3 Instagram content angles tied to real work Philippe has made or plans to make; deliverable: content-plan markdown with hook, source work, and posting angle | Why: Supports Instagram growth through publishable work or process content tied to Philippe's real practice | Proof: Output ties content ideas to real work Philippe made or will make, with clear posting angle | Unlocks: Advances goal progress measurably

[Other] 🎁 Surprise MVP: build a lightweight daily check page or script for one recurring workspace status view; deliverable: runnable utility in projects/automation/ or scripts/ | Why: A small system tool can create durable daily value without touching risky config | Proof: Tool shows one genuinely useful status snapshot from local workspace data | Unlocks: Better operational visibility for future automation
